testcase.name: test_calisthenics_bodyweight_only

failure.message: AssertionError: Calisthenics workout contains barbell equipment exercises: [{'name': 'Pistol Squat (assisted)', 'equipment': 'barbell'}, {'name': 'Bulgarian Split Squat', 'equipment': 'barbell'}, {'name': 'Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift', 'equipment': 'barbell'}, {'name': 'Bench Dip', 'equipment': 'barbell'}, {'name': 'Jump Squat', 'equipment': 'barbell'}] assert 5 == 0 + where 5 = len([{'equipment': 'barbell', 'name': 'Pistol Squat (assisted)'}, {'equipment': 'barbell', 'name': 'Bulgarian Split Squat'}, {'equipment': 'barbell', 'name': 'Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift'}, {'equipment': 'barbell', 'name': 'Bench Dip'}, {'equipment': 'barbell', 'name': 'Jump Squat'}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_elite_coaching_engine.py:351: in test_calisthenics_bodyweight_only assert len(barbell_exercises) == 0, \ E AssertionError: Calisthenics workout contains barbell equipment exercises: [{'name': 'Pistol Squat (assisted)', 'equipment': 'barbell'}, {'name': 'Bulgarian Split Squat', 'equipment': 'barbell'}, {'name': 'Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift', 'equipment': 'barbell'}, {'name': 'Bench Dip', 'equipment': 'barbell'}, {'name': 'Jump Squat', 'equipment': 'barbell'}] E assert 5 == 0 E + where 5 = len([{'equipment': 'barbell', 'name': 'Pistol Squat (assisted)'}, {'equipment': 'barbell', 'name': 'Bulgarian Split Squat'}, {'equipment': 'barbell', 'name': 'Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift'}, {'equipment': 'barbell', 'name': 'Bench Dip'}, {'equipment': 'barbell', 'name': 'Jump Squat'}])
